nodes.context: Outlaw motorcycle club founded in 1961 in San Bernardino, California, with chapters across the US, especially New England.
Outlaw motorcycle club, part of the 'Big Four', involved in a brawl with Diablos in 2019.
Rival motorcycle club; member Mike D'Amato was murdered by a Diablos member in 1992.

edges.context: Diablos and Outlaws were involved in a mass brawl in Plainville, Connecticut in May 2019, leaving two Outlaws injured.
Diablos member Raymond Stone confessed to the 1992 murder of James Gang member Mike D'Amato.
